$comment: Behavior-preservation mapping for the validator-consumes-schemas adoption (3.1). The live validate_procheiron2.py grades some field problems as ERROR and others as WARNING. A naive 'schema fails => error' swap would change behavior: it would turn today's warnings (non-standard type/scope, unknown created_by, length overflow) into hard FAILs and would newly hard-fail audit-event field shapes the validator never checked. To preserve exact current semantics, the consuming validator downgrades the schema-failure paths listed here to warnings; everything else schema-fails as error. Each entry cites the live validator behavior it preserves.

memory_record.schema.json./properties/id/pattern: validator does not check id shape (only emptiness + duplicate)
memory_record.schema.json./properties/statement/maxLength: validator does not bound statement length (memory_propose does, at write time)
memory_record.schema.json./properties/valid_from/pattern: validator does not check date format
memory_record.schema.json./properties/valid_until/pattern: validator does not check date format
memory_record.schema.json./additionalProperties: validator tolerates unknown fields; forward-compat => warning
memory_record.schema.json./properties/supersedes/items/pattern: validator checks target existence, not id shape

audit_event.schema.json.*: the live validator does NOT field-check audit events at all (it only requires valid JSON objects and reads recognized keys). Every audit_event schema failure is a warning, EXCEPT the promotion-family branch below, which backs a real validator error indirectly.

adapter_manifest.schema.json./properties/read_roots/items: live adapters.jsonl read_roots are machine-absolute; validator does not flag adapter paths => warning until a future tokenizing migration

source_record.schema.json.*: no live source records exist yet; the whole schema is a forward contract. Until capturers populate _sources, source-record failures are warnings.

manifest.schema.json./additionalProperties: YAML manifests are deliberately free-form per deployment
manifest.schema.json./properties/external_action_authority: validator coerces non-true strings to false

config.schema.json./properties/paths/required: the dangling-token closure (required_tokens.json) is the authoritative token check; a missing OPTIONAL path that no doc references is a warning. Missing console/memory/sources stays error (resolver + validator already hard-require those).

always_error.$comment: Paths that MUST stay error regardless of the above, because the live validator already errors on them.
